News & Updates

Blog

Announcements, project write-ups, and research notes from the WordPress Research Fellows Program.

All Announcements Project Updates Research Notes

  • Announcements

    Applications Open for Summer 2027 Fellows

    July 1, 2026 · darshanaswathappa

    Applications for the Summer 2027 cohort of the WordPress Research Fellows Program are now open. The program expands to six research tracks this year. Deadline: December 1, 2026.

  • Project Updates

    Building a Faster Block Editor: Performance Track Recap

    June 24, 2026 · darshanaswathappa

    Our performance track cut WordPress block editor time-to-interactive by nearly a third by deferring non-critical scripts and trimming global styles. A Summer 2026 recap.

  • Research Notes

    Notes on Accessible Color Systems

    June 17, 2026 · darshanaswathappa

    How we audited a design system for WCAG AA accessible color contrast failures and fixed them without breaking the brand palette. A practical research note.

  • Announcements

    Meet the 2026 Fellows

    June 10, 2026 · darshanaswathappa

    Meet the fourteen undergraduates who made up the 2026 WordPress Research Fellows cohort at Northeastern University and discover what they built over the summer.

  • Project Updates

    Plugin Architecture Track: Lessons in Extensibility

    June 3, 2026 · darshanaswathappa

    The plugin architecture track built an extensible WordPress reporting plugin using hooks, filters, and the Abilities API. Lessons in WordPress plugin architecture extensibility.

  • Research Notes

    Mentorship Model: How We Pair Fellows and Faculty

    May 20, 2026 · darshanaswathappa

    How the WordPress Research Fellows Program pairs undergraduates with faculty mentors, and the weekly check-in structure that keeps ten-week projects on track.
